input.newString:
interface TokenRisk {
  isSpam: boolean
  isHoneypot: boolean
  riskLevel: 'safe' | 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'
  flags: string[]
  taxes?: {
    buyTax?: number
    sellTax?: number
    transferTax?: number
    source?: 'goplus' | 'honeypot.is'
  }
  holders?: {
    count?: number
    top10Percent?: number
    creatorPercent?: number
    lpHolderCount?: number
    lpTop10Percent?: number
  }
  contract?: {
    isOpenSource?: boolean
    isMintable?: boolean
    isProxy?: boolean
    canSelfDestruct?: boolean
    transferPausable?: boolean
    ownerCanChangeBalance?: boolean
    canTakeBackOwnership?: boolean
    hiddenOwner?: boolean
    deployedAt?: number
    agedays?: number
  }
  liquidity?: {
    hasLiquidity?: boolean
    isLiquidityLocked?: boolean
    lockPercent?: number
    lockUntil?: string
    dexName?: string
  }
  verdict?: string
}
